items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Hey ya! Long time no see, {PlayerName}. How’s it going?

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Well, just calling to see what you're up to. Are you free now?

options.text: What happened?

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: No worries at all! It’s no biggie, really. Well, not as huge as diving into those tokens, that’s for sure.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Remember my promise? About treating you to a nice meal? Well, since I’ve got a few days off and figured you’d be around, now’s the perfect time to cash in on that promise and invite you out.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: So, what do you say? How about this Jinzhou Speedster takes you on a culinary adventure at Auntie Panhua’s Restaurant?

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: The Maocai she cooks is an explosion of spice and flavor! One gulp and you’ll feel the buzz in your bones!

options.text: Alright, it sounds spicy just as I expected.
Where there’s delicious food, there’s me.
Great! When should we go?

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: You know, that’s what I like. But hey, no pressure if spicy isn’t your thing. Auntie Panhua’s a culinary genius, whipping up many treats like Poached Chicken, Rising Loong... you name it! It’s all authentic Jinzhou cuisine!

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Didn’t expect you to be a foodie too. Next time I’m on patrol and find something tasty, I’ll make sure you get a taste.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: So, we’re on for a date, right?

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Let’s meet at Panhua’s Restaurant on Gourmet Street. Time-wise, just let me know before you’re ready.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: I’ll be eagerly waiting to hear from you!

dialog.stepLabel: （饭馆）饭馆吃饭并得到原始配方
dialog.nodeDesc: （饭馆）饭馆吃饭并得到原始配方

items.text: After arriving near Panhua's Restaurant, you message Chixia and wait for a moment...

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Hey there, Rover! Finally found you! Hope I didn’t keep you waiting!

options.text: Felt like forever. My stomach’s rumbling already.
No worries. Delicacies are always worth the wait.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Ah, my bad! Let’s not dilly-dally any longer. Trust me, once we munch, you won’t wanna stop!

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Aw, you’re too kind, but eating always comes first! Let’s dive straight into ordering and kick-start this feast!

items.speaker: Panhua
items.text: Ah, well, look who’s here! Our little Xiaofang has brought a friend along today. How delightful!

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: No, no, no, Auntie Panhua, just forget that name! I’m begging you!

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Yeah, exactly! Meet Rover, my awesome new friend! Today’s treat’s on me, so I brought {Male=him;Female=her} here to experience your culinary magic.

items.speaker: Panhua
items.text: Oh dear, then I must show {Male=him;Female=her} something!

items.speaker: Panhua
items.text: Any preferences or dislikes? Sweet, salty, sour, spicy, just let me know what you like. There’s always a Jinzhou cuisine for every taste!

options.text: I prefer something light, something that lets the ingredients shine.
Spicy! Give me the thrill!
I’m not picky. Chixia, any recommendations?

items.speaker: Panhua
items.text: Alright, something light... Find yourselves a spot inside. The dishes will be ready soon.
Before long, Panhua served up the dishes. The delicious pairing of sweet Candied Caltrops and slow-cooked Jinzhou Stew made you hungry.

items.speaker: Panhua
items.text: Alright, something spicy... Find yourselves a spot inside. The dishes will be ready soon.
Before long, Panhua serves the dishes. The saucy Poached Chicken, complemented by the spicy and numbing Mapo Tofu, whets your appetite.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Hmm... The Candied Caltrops is fresh with just the right sweetness; the Poached Chicken sauce is Auntie Panhua’s original, unmatched anywhere else. Oh, and the Jinzhou Stew! It’s something you can only find here. I bet you’ve never tasted anything like it! Trust me, you don’t wanna miss out on this!

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: I’ve decided. Let’s get all of them.

options.text: Thanks, but it’s unnecessary.
That’s too much... Can we finish them all?

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: We Patrollers don’t get paid a lot, but I love treating my friend to a feast once in a while. It’s just one meal, I won’t go broke!

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: To cater to all appetites, Auntie Panhua’s rolled out a small portion menu. Same fantastic flavors, just less food waste. So, no need to fret about over-ordering!

items.speaker: Panhua
items.text: Alright, find yourselves a spot inside. The dishes will be ready soon.
Before long, Panhua served up the dishes. The delicious mix of Candied Caltrops, Poached Chicken in sauce, and Jinzhou Stew made your mouth water.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Rover, you enjoying the meal?

options.text: Yeah, it was amazing. I’ll certainly be back for more.
Not bad.
I want something special this time.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: You got it! Next time, we’ll bring Yangyang and Baizhi along. Food’s always better with more pals, right? But what should we get then?

items.speaker: Panhua
items.text: If you come next time, I’ll have to treat you to a taste of my famous Essence Medley Soup.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: That’s all? Seriously? Not even Auntie Panhua’s culinary magic can shake you?

items.speaker: Panhua
items.text: Looks like I’ll have to introduce you to the wonders of the Essence Medley Soup.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Something special? Hmm, give me some time to think.

items.speaker: Panhua
items.text: In that case, I’ll have to introduce you to the wonders of the Essence Medley Soup.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Essence Medley Soup? What’s that?

items.speaker: Panhua
items.text: It's brewed from the finest Jinzhou ingredients. Every essence is simmered and distilled into a single bowl. Some gourmets claim it's the epitome of Jinzhou's flavor, captured in a nutshell.

options.text: Don't tell me you're thinking of trying it right now...
Why the eager expression?
It sounds super delicious. I’m eager to give it a taste myself.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Even though I just polished off my plate, there’s always room for soup in my second stomach. Rover, fancy trying it out? Auntie Panhua, can you whip it up for us?

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Whoa, did you hear that? Brewed from the finest Jinzhou ingredients! My taste buds are tingling already... Rover, fancy trying it out? Auntie Panhua, can you whip it up for us?

items.speaker: Panhua
items.text: It's not that I'm unwilling to make it right now... In fact, it's an old wartime dish, a recipe lost to the ages. We keep it alive through word of mouth, preserving its memory. Now, about its taste, people have a lot of fun debates about it, but one thing's certain: it's like a warm, fresh hug, absolutely delightful and unforgettable.

items.speaker: Panhua
items.text: However, while searching through old books, I stumbled upon its recipe. Though, calling it a recipe might be a stretch. See, back then, they used names for ingredients that are like riddles to us now. “Red beads,” “sweet roots,” “Monkvyrid,” “golden handle spoon”... I have no idea what they are.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Speaking of peculiar ingredients, it does remind me of someone...

options.text: Who?

items.speaker: Panhua
items.text: Stop beating around the bush. Just tell me. I won’t take offense.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Well… it’s Uncle Mahe!

items.speaker: Panhua
items.text: Hmph, he’s always bragging about how he can get any ingredient, but if he’s clueless about these, he’s just wasting his time in this business.

items.speaker: Panhua
items.text: Just so we’re clear, I won’t go to him for answers, but if you want to give him a shot with this recipe, it’s your call.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Auntie Panhua! You’ve got the sweetest heart. I always knew it!

items.speaker: Panhua
items.text: Alright, I’ll copy the recipe for you.

options.text: I’ll take a stroll around the city with Chixia to get a feel for the place.
Once the soup’s done, don’t forget to let us have a taste!

items.speaker: Panhua
items.text: Don’t worry! I won’t let you do it for nothing! Auntie here will make sure you eat your fill!

items.speaker: Koko
items.text: Hello there, how can I help...? Oh, Ms. Chixia?

items.speaker: Koko
items.text: What brought you here? Picking up medicine for someone else, or feeling under the weather? Any injuries? Have you seen a doctor? Need any prescriptions?

options.text: Wow, quite the enthusiastic welcome there.
It seems you get worried for her pretty often.

items.speaker: Koko
items.text: Oh no, it’s just a habit I’ve picked up from running this pharmacy. Sometimes people struggle to describe their symptoms, so I ask a lot of questions to get a clearer picture.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Yeah... Hold up! Rover, what’s that supposed to mean? Obviously, I...

items.speaker: Koko
items.text: Obviously, just like this {Male=gentleman;Female=lady} said, once you get carried away, you forget your own safety!

items.speaker: Koko
items.text: Ms. Chixia, you’re the reigning champ on our pharmacy’s medication leaderboard. While I wholeheartedly appreciate your support, topping the charts won’t result in any discounts here.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Seriously, don’t you have work to do? Who keeps tabs on this stuff anyway!

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Alright, let’s cut to the chase. {PlayerName} and I are here to get you to check out this recipe Auntie Panhua handed us.

items.speaker: Koko
items.text: Essence Medley Soup? I felt like I heard it from my grandmother or someone of her generation.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Really? C’mon, wrack your brain for it! Uncle Mahe thinks it’s more of a medicinal cuisine than a regular dish.

items.speaker: Koko
items.text: Let's see... Caltrops, Kudzu, Honeysuckles, a handful of Gemberries, and some pulled poultry breast. Simmer with water from the Monkvyrid. Once it's boiled, give it a stir with a golden-handled spoon... Water from the Monkvyrid? Isn't that the medicinal soup made from Coriolus, Perilla, and Lemongrass?

items.speaker: Koko
items.text: Who knew the medicinal soup could serve as a base... In a way, it leans towards medicinal cuisine. But with so many ingredients, wouldn’t it dilute the medicinal effect? There’s always something new to learn in dietary therapy.

options.text: Since we know the ingredients required, Chixia and I will head out and grab what we need.
Are you interested in dietary therapy?

items.speaker: Koko
items.text: No need to go through all that trouble. Remember where you are? A pharmacy! I’ve got some pre-made medicinal soup right here.

items.speaker: Koko
items.text: Good medicine often tastes bitter, so I've been thinking of ways to make it more palatable.

items.speaker: Koko
items.text: By making it into medicinal cuisine, we preserve its healing qualities while getting rid of the bitterness, so it’s enjoyable for everyone.

items.speaker: Koko
items.text: This recipe seems ancient. The Monkvyrid water is an old term from pharmacies, referring to that medicinal soup. Hold on, I’ve got the pre-made stuff for you.

items.speaker: Koko
items.text: Oh, and here are some new recovery and synthesis potions. Consider them a bonus.

items.speaker: Koko
items.text: But even with potions to treat your injuries, stay safe out there, alright? Always keep your guard up when exploring.

items.speaker: Koko
items.text: Don’t be like Chixia, just barging in and scaring everyone.

options.text: Thanks for reminding me.
Trust me. I won’t.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Are you for real right now? My reputation as the Jinzhou Speedster is...

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: I-I had no other choice! How can I remember all those safety rules when there are bad guys coming at me? They’d only slow me down... Okay, okay, next time, I’ll watch out!

items.speaker: Koko
items.text: So, are you two heading back to help Auntie Panhua with this Essence Medley Soup? If so, count me in on learning that recipe too!

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Just let Auntie Panhua know. It should be cool for you to join in!

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: But there's still one last piece of the puzzle to crack: the golden-handled spoon. If we whip up the soup without figuring out what that is about, the flavor might not hit the mark, right?

items.speaker: Koko
items.text: Wait, isn’t the golden handle spoon that big pyrite spoon from Uncle Wei’s shop? I thought you both knew.

options.text: The answer was right in front of us all along.
That makes sense... After all, pyrite is called fool’s gold.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Seriously? No way! Who’d have guessed that!

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Oops, looks like I gotta step down from my role as the Jinzhou encyclopedia. I’ve never even heard of that pyrite spoon!

items.speaker: Koko
items.text: Haha, no worries. I spotted that spoon the last time I dropped off medicine at Uncle Wei’s and asked out of curiosity.

items.speaker: Koko
items.text: Why does the best weapon maker in Jinzhou have a big pyrite spoon tucked away? Well, I’m counting on you to solve that mystery, along with the last step of the recipe.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: We’ve covered more ground from Gourmet Street to here. Bet you haven’t had many city strolls like this before, huh?

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Even though it’s a bit of a trek, I’m thrilled to show you around my hometown. We’re nearing the Main Street, where things get even more interesting.

items.speaker: Uncle Wei
items.text: Well, well, if it isn’t our Xiaofang. Back so soon? Didn’t I just fix up your pistols last week? You broke them again already?

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: ...Aw, please don’t call me Xiaofang! It’s Chixia!

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Oh no, I'm doomed. It seems everyone knows my other name now.

items.speaker: Uncle Wei
items.text: Haha, you’re exaggerating. As far as I know, only we, your old pals, are calling you that.

options.text: Uncle Wei, no need to tease her.
Got it now, Xiaofang.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Cool, cool. Let’s get to business then.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: {PlayerName}, you too?! No, please no... Let’s keep that name between us, alright?

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Anyway, we're here to help Auntie Panhua recreate the Essence Medley Soup.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: The recipe says we need to stir it with a golden-handled spoon once it starts bubbling. And Koko mentioned you happen to have a pyrite spoon with that exact name, right?

items.speaker: Uncle Wei
items.text: Ah, I see.

items.speaker: Uncle Wei
items.text: That’s right. The golden handle spoon, indeed the pyrite spoon I have. And let me tell you, I have a bit of history with this Essence Medley Soup. Any guess what this soup is all about?

options.text: A secret medicinal cuisine.
A secret dish.
A chowder.

items.speaker: Uncle Wei
items.text: Just a simple brew of herbs, really. Barely qualifies as medicinal cuisine in my book.

items.speaker: Uncle Wei
items.text: Well, I don’t think it’s a formal dish, seeing as we just throw a bunch of ingredients together.

items.speaker: Uncle Wei
items.text: Haha, you have the point. It’s indeed a chowder, but not an ordinary one.

items.speaker: Uncle Wei
items.text: You youngsters didn’t witness the making of this soup. Back then, Jinzhou was still under construction, right around the year-end. Every household would bring out their cherished foods to share. And if they had nothing, they’d whip up some medicinal soup. If that wasn’t an option, they’d pitch in however they could.

items.speaker: Uncle Wei
items.text: And that’s when I forged this large pyrite spoon. Made stirring that big pot a breeze. What a shame though, those border guards insisted on every bit of metal being used for weapons. Otherwise, you’d still see it around.

options.text: So that’s the authentic Essence Medley Soup.
So that’s the real recipe.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: No wonder Auntie Panhua said it’s passed down through word of mouth, sparking debates over its flavor.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Seems like this recipe is more of a shopping list than a detailed guide.

options.text: I know it must be delicious.
Is it really going to taste good?

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Absolutely! Every household pulled out their secret stash of ingredients to brew up this soup. It’s gotta be divine.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Even if it doesn’t require any fancy cooking techniques, those good reviews can’t be bogus, right? Just like Auntie Panhua said, it’s brewed from the finest Jinzhou ingredients...

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Now I’m even more eager to get a taste, knowing the backstory! Uncle Wei, mind lending us your big pyrite spoon?

items.speaker: Uncle Wei
items.text: The reason that the spoon affects the soup's flavor is because it releases a few minerals while stirring. You could use a smaller pyrite spoon instead.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: That makes sense... By the way, doesn’t Auntie Panhua already have one on standby?

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Since we’re here, might as well make the most of it. Can you lend a hand and check out my friend’s weapon?

items.speaker: Uncle Wei
items.text: Ah, I remember you. New to Jinzhou, right? You’re that... that...

options.text: {PlayerName}.
Rover.

items.speaker: Uncle Wei
items.text: That’s right. Madam Magistrate mentioned you’re Jinzhou’s guest.

items.speaker: Uncle Wei
items.text: Let’s have a look at your weapon... Hm, this wear and tear... Can’t let youngsters like you wander around with a weapon in this state.

items.speaker: Uncle Wei
items.text: Here, take these unused <color=Highlight>casting molds and ores</color> the Ordnance Division gave me. They’re the building blocks of a weapon. With these, you can forge a new one.

options.text: I feel bad for taking them...
Thank you so much.

items.speaker: Uncle Wei
items.text: Kid, materials are meant to be used. If you want to thank me, put them to good use.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Check it out. That’s Uncle Wei’s weapon shop right over there.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: He’s the top-notch weapon maker in Jinzhou! If you have any weapon-related questions, just go ask him.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: How’s your weapon maintenance? Once we figure out what that big spoon deal is, you can ask him to check it for you!

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: And here we are. This is the <color=Highlight>Synthesizer</color> Uncle Wei mentioned.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Aside from crafting materials and beefing up their quality, you can also whip up some basic potions here. It’s like a one-stop shop for all your needs, whether you’re kicking it in the city or out on an adventure.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: I’ve got some synthesis materials right here. Go ahead, give it a try.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: It might seem a bit tricky just hearing about it, but once you try it hands-on, you’ll get the hang of it real quick.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Wow, can you believe we’ve covered almost half of Jinzhou in just one day?

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Tiring, but so worth it! I’m usually tied up with patrols, so catching up with so many friends all at once like this is a total first for me.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Introducing you to everyone, shooting the breeze... It’s like reconnecting with old friends all over again. Wait, didn’t I promise to treat you to a meal? How did it end up with you being my tour buddy instead?

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: But hey, thanks to you, I finally get why folks rave about the Essence Medley Soup as they do.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Brewed from the finest Jinzhou ingredients, with every essence distilled into a single bowl... The real treasure lies in everyone’s willingness to share their most prized grub, don’t you think?

options.text: That’s the true Jinzhou flavor.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Exactly! If we were back in wartime, Auntie Panhua reminding me to eat on time, Uncle Mahe caring about my work, Koko fretting over my safety, Uncle Wei dropping knowledge bombs on me, and all the other folks in Jinzhou...

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: They’d all without a doubt open up their pantries and share their most cherished grub with us.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: As for me, I wanna be someone who can protect every single soul in Jinzhou... including you! I wanna keep you safe too! I’ve had a great time hanging out with you.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: So, while we’re in Jinzhou, let me shoulder your worries and troubles, alright?

options.text: Looks like I can’t say no.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: You can bet on this Jinzhou Speedster’s determination!
